title: Prototype Readiness Check Schema
description: Schema for validating whether the repository is ready to begin implementation for the first playable prototype.

readiness_check_id.description: Unique identifier for this readiness check instance.

prototype_id.description: The ID of the prototype being checked (e.g., 'tower_engine_mvp_001').

content_pack_id.description: The content pack ID for which the prototype is being built (e.g., 'damian').

required_prior_patches_passed.description: List of patch IDs that must have successfully passed their audits.

included_systems_confirmed.description: List of systems confirmed to be within the prototype's scope.

excluded_systems_confirmed.description: List of systems confirmed to be explicitly outside the prototype's scope.

scope_creep_detected.description: Must be false. True if any systems beyond the defined prototype scope were introduced.

ready_for_runtime_implementation.description: Must be true. Indicates all architectural groundwork is complete for runtime implementation.

implementation_start_patch.description: The patch ID where runtime implementation is expected to begin.
